strengths: Meets 15+ years requirement with 19 years of diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Strong full-stack engineering foundation with cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and DevOps expertise
Demonstrates technical excellence and knowledge leadership through open-source projects, mentoring, and workshops
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise—only recent MCP work mentioned with no AI-first products or ML platforms built
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership or advising enterprise customers on technology adoption strategy
Career trajectory shows hands-on engineer progression rather than strategic/advisory roles required for principal engineer level
response.justification: While this candidate brings 19 years of solid software engineering experience and strong technical fundamentals across multiple domains, the role explicitly requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI. The resume shows only recent MCP/AI-agent infrastructure work with minimal detail, insufficient for a principal engineer role focused on AI strategy. There is also no evidence of director-level strategic leadership or customer advisory responsibilities. The background is strong for a senior engineer but not aligned with this principal engineer position's AI and strategic requirements.
